calendar.matters:
NOTICE OF COURT HEARING (ELDER OR DEPENDENT ADULT ABUSE)
Off Calendar Dec-12-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Nancy Rasch for and with Debra Dolch as Limited Conservator of the Person and Estate for Janet Hansen (Petitioner).

Ms. Dolch was sworn prior to commencement of the proceeding.

Ms. Rasch reported that the Respondent was evicted on December 5, 2012 and his whereabouts is unknown. She further requested the Court to take judicial notice of the Conservatorship proceeding since 2001 and the eviction proceeding. The Court stated it can take judicial notice of the fact of the eviction but the declaration is hearsay that does not meet the evidentiary burden and that the Petitioner is required to have evidence presented at trial. Ms. Rasch stated that they are not prepare to go forward. The case is dismissed for evidence not available to sustain the petition.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Court Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Deputy J. Gomez.
